title: In a binary search tree, the keys on the same level from left to
content:
In a binary search tree, the keys on the same level from left to right must be in sorted (non-decreasing) order.
~@[](2)
author: DS课程组
description: In a binary search tree, the keys on the same level from left to right must be in sorted (non-decreasing) order.

title: Given a binary search tree with 20 integer keys which include 4,
content: Given a binary search tree with 20 integer keys which include 4, 5, and 6, if 4 and 6 are on the same level, then 5 must be their parent. ~@[](2)
author: 干红华
description: Given a binary search tree with 20 integer keys which include 4, 5, and 6, if 4 and 6 are on the same level, then 5 must be their parent.

title: The time complexity of searching in a binary search tree is the
content:
The time complexity of searching in a binary search tree is the same as that of binary search.
~@[](2)
author: DS课程组
description: The time complexity of searching in a binary search tree is the same as that of binary search.

title: Given a binary search tree as shown in the following figure.  Wh
content:
Given a binary search tree as shown in the following figure.  Which of the following relationships is correct with respect to the given tree? @[](2)
![fGRE17-6.JPG](~/c303e1c2-3dff-4e7b-8386-b2af45a52e02.JPG)

A. $$x_1 < x_2 < x_5$$
B. $$x_1 < x_4 < x_5$$
C. $$x_3 < x_5 < x_4$$
D. $$x_4 < x_3 < x_5$$

title: Given the structure of a binary search tree (as shown in the fig
content:
Given the structure of a binary search tree (as shown in the figure), which one of the following insertion sequences is impossible? @[](3)

![206.jpg](~/84984823-130d-462a-ad9e-ee6457b1ce56.jpg)

A. `83 67 91 98 20 75`
B. `83 67 75 91 20 98`
C. `83 91 75 67 20 98`
D. `83 91 98 67 75 20`
author: 干红华
description:
Given the structure of a binary search tree (as shown in the figure), which one of the following insertion sequences is impossible?

![206.jpg](~/84984823-130d-462a-ad9e-ee6457b1ce56.jpg)

choices: One possible preorder traversal sequence of the resulting tree may be { 2, 15, 10, 12, 21 }
One possible preorder traversal sequence of the resulting tree may be { 10, 2, 15, 12, 21 }
One possible preorder traversal sequence of the resulting tree may be { 15, 10, 2, 12, 21 }
It is possible that the new root may have 2 children

title: Given a binary search tree with its preorder traversal sequence
author: 陈越
description: Given a binary search tree with its preorder traversal sequence { 8, 2, 15, 10, 12, 21 }.  If 8 is deleted from the tree, which one of the following statements is FALSE?

title: For a binary search tree, in which order of traversal that we ca
content:
For a binary search tree, in which order of traversal that we can obtain a non-decreasing sequence? @[](1)

A. preorder traversal
B. postorder traversal
C. inorder traversal
D. level-order traversal
author: DS课程组
description: For a binary search tree, in which order of traversal that we can obtain a non-decreasing sequence?

choices: The in-order successor does not exist for 75.

title: Consider the following operations performed on an initially empt
content: 这是一个单选题的样例。答案为C，分值为2分。
author: 朱建科
description:
Consider the following operations performed on an initially empty Binary Search Tree (BST):
Insert: 100, 50, 150, 25, 75, 125, 175
Delete: 100 (replaced with its in-order successor) 
Insert: 110
After these operations, which node will be the in-order successor of 75 in the final BST?
